label: Experience Pak
blurb: Event Management, Hospitality & Travel Ops. Revenue maximization and complex coordination.

skills.label: Flight Delay Reaccommodation
skills.method: The moment a flight is canceled, instantly runs an algorithm to re-book 150 stranded passengers on alternative routes based on loyalty status.
trigger_examples: replaces the 4-hour customer service line at the gate

skills.label: Restaurant Table Turn Optimizer
skills.method: Analyzes POS data to predict exactly when a table will leave, dynamically quoting accurate wait times to walk-ins.

skills.label: Event Badge Printing Sync
skills.method: Syncs late ticket sales with on-site printers, deduplicating names, and formatting QR codes for instant check-in.

skills.label: Speaker Presentation Chaser
skills.method: Pings conference speakers relentlessly until they upload their slide decks, then automatically checks the aspect ratio and fonts.
trigger_examples: saves event organizers from the day-of-show av panic

skills.label: Hotel Yield Dynamic Pricer
skills.method: Adjusts room rates hourly based on local event API data (e.g., Taylor Swift tour), competitor scraping, and historical occupancy.

skills.label: Banquet Event Order Generator
skills.method: Translates a client's messy email requests into a strict BEO (Banquet Event Order) for the kitchen, AV, and setup teams.
trigger_examples: prevents event day disasters and missed catering requests

skills.label: Food Waste Predictor
skills.method: Analyzes hotel breakfast consumption against guest demographics to prep the exact right amount of eggs and bacon.

skills.label: Vip Guest Preference Tracker
skills.method: Scrapes past stay data across global properties to ensure a high-roller's room is pre-stocked with their exact preferred brand of water and pillow type.

skills.label: Group Block Attrition Alert
skills.method: Warns hotel sales managers if a wedding block is not filling up 30 days out, triggering the release of rooms back to the public.
